label: baseline
notes: Baseline. Files 01-04 each took ~13.6s (near timeout). Files 05+ took ~700-950ms.

label: exp1-cdn-mock
notes: Mock CDN (KaTeX) with local stubs + pre-define renderMathInElement in katex stub. 53/53 pass. 57% faster than baseline.

label: exp2-8workers-smart-wait
notes: 8 workers + poll for canvas.width>0 instead of fixed 500ms wait. 53/53 pass. 36% faster than exp1. First-batch (01-08) takes ~2s, rest ~300-700ms.

label: exp3-12workers
notes: 12 workers: REGRESSED to 13.3s. More workers = more resource contention. First batch took 3.3s each. 8 workers is the sweet spot.

label: exp4-load-150ms
notes: waitUntil:load + 150ms fixed wait. REGRESSED to 11.4s. load event waits for all sub-resources including CDN stubs, adding latency vs domcontentloaded.

label: exp5-lean-chromium-flags
notes: Added lean Chromium flags (disable-extensions, no-first-run, disable-sync, etc). 8.8s total, 7.2s test time. Best so far. Per-test time for batches 2+ dropped to 250-400ms.

label: exp6-context-routes
notes: Context-level route registration (once per worker). REGRESSED to 11.2s. Custom fixture overhead outweighs savings from fewer route calls.

label: exp7-6workers
notes: 6 workers. REGRESSED to 10.2s. Fewer workers = more sequential batches. 8 is sweet spot.
